answers: Funeral planning: choose burial vs cremation, select funeral home, plan ceremony, notify family and friends.
Pre-planning reduces stress on family and can lock in lower costs. Document your wishes clearly.
Tips: compare funeral home prices, consider pre-paid plans, and know that simple ceremonies can be beautiful.
Funeral costs vary widely ($1,000-$15,000+). Cremation is typically less expensive than traditional burial.
